hero.title: Roadmap direction
hero.intro: Public milestones focus on trust, education, and steady operational progress.

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.focus: Safety communication baseline and verified link routines.
phases.checkpoint: Consistent source-of-truth messaging in public channels.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.focus: Community education rhythm and moderation support.

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.focus: Refine governance habits and transparent reporting cadence.
phases.checkpoint: Documented progress updates with realistic language.

aspiration.title: Optional real-world aspiration
aspiration.body: As the community matures, it may explore responsible social impact initiatives when capacity allows.
